name: nat-vent-comfort-floor-exit-restores-heat
description: Natural ventilation fan shuts off and heat restores when indoor temp drops to comfort_heat floor (Issue #99)

verdict.summary: When _natural_vent_active=True and indoor drops to comfort_heat, fan deactivates and HVAC restores to heat without entering pause
verdict.observed_behavior: nat_vent_comfort_floor_exit with hvac_mode restored to heat, paused_by_door=False
verdict.expected_behavior: nat_vent_comfort_floor_exit with hvac_mode restored to heat, paused_by_door=False

events.note: Indoor above floor, outdoor 62F well below threshold 78F — nat vent eligible
Door opens — enters natural ventilation, fan activates, HVAC off
Indoor dropped to comfort_heat=70F. Outdoor still cool — no outdoor exit. Comfort-floor exit must fire.

assertions.reason: door opened; outdoor 62F <= threshold 78F — nat vent activated
indoor 70F <= comfort_heat 70F — fan stops, heat restores, paused_by_door stays False
